Rerun Space View utilities

Types & utilities for defining Space View classes and communicating with the Viewport.

Modules

  • controls
  • external

Structs

  • EntityOverrideContext
  • SpaceViewBlueprint
    A view of a space.
  • SpaceViewContents
    An implementation of DataQuery that is built from a blueprint_archetypes::SpaceViewContents.

Enums

  • ScreenshotMode

Traits

  • DataQuery
    The common trait implemented for data queries
  • PropertyResolver
    Trait for resolving properties needed by most implementations of DataQuery

Functions

  • determine_visualizable_entities
    Determines the set of visible entities for a given space view.
  • diff_component_filter
    Utility for implementing re_viewer_context::VisualizerAdditionalApplicabilityFilter using on the properties of a concrete component.
  • edit_blueprint_component
    Edit a single component of a blueprint archetype in a space view.
  • entity_path_for_view_property
  • get_blueprint_component
    Read a single component of a blueprint archetype in a space view.
  • query_view_property
    Returns Ok(None) if any of the required components are missing.
  • query_view_property_or_default
  • suggest_space_view_for_each_entity
    Spawns a space view for each single entity which is visualizable & indicator-matching for a given visualizer.
  • view_property
    Return the archetype value for the given space view, or None if it doesn’t exist.
